name: Grapefruit with a Twist
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-4 quart pan, combine sugar and 2/3 cup water. Boil, uncovered, over high heat until reduced to 1/2 cup. Gently twist lemon peel into the syrup; let cool.
If made ahead, cover and chill up to 3 days.
2. With a sharp knife, cut away the peel and all white membrane from grapefruit. Over a bowl, cut between membranes to release fruit segments; squeeze juice from the membrane into the bowl. Discard the membrane.
If made ahead, cover and let stand for up to 3 hours.
3. Spoon fruit, juice, and syrup equally into 6 dessert bowls. Garnish with leaves. To each portion, add about 1 tablespoon gin or orange juice, and juice from lemon wedges.
